detail.translated:
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 description inside
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
# Interface security-level mapped via firewall zone
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description outside
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
# Interface security-level mapped via firewall zone
acl number 3000
 description VPN_ACL - permit ip from INSIDE_NET to REMOTE_NET
 rule 5 permit ip source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 destination 198.18.100.0 0.0.0.255
# NAT exemption for VPN traffic - identity NAT (no translation)
acl number 3001
 description NAT exemption for VPN - INSIDE_NET to REMOTE_NET
 rule 5 permit ip source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 destination 198.18.100.0 0.0.0.255
quit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 nat outbound 3001
ike proposal 10
 encryption-algorithm aes-256
 authentication-algorithm sha1
 dh group2
 sa duration 86400
quit
ike peer VPN_PEER_198.18.254.2
 ike-proposal 10
 remote-address 198.18.254.2
 pre-shared-key %$%$# MANUAL_REVIEW: Pre-shared key redacted in source, must configure actual key %$%$
quit
ipsec proposal AES256
 encapsulation-mode tunnel
 esp encryption-algorithm aes-256
 esp authentication-algorithm sha1
quit
ipsec policy VPN_POLICY 10 isakmp
 security acl 3000
 ike-peer VPN_PEER_198.18.254.2
 proposal AES256
quit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 ipsec policy VPN_POLICY
ip route-static 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254

detail.translated:
hostname FIREWALL_NAT_SP
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 description To-Internal
 nameif inside
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 security-level 100
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description To-Internet
 nameif outside
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 security-level 0
 no shutdown
object network OBJ_INTERNAL
 subnet 10.0.0.0 255.255.0.0
!
object network POOL_INTERNET
 range 198.18.10.1 198.18.10.254
!
nat (inside,outside) source static OBJ_INTERNAL OBJ_INTERNAL pool POOL_INTERNET no-proxy-arp ! MANUAL_REVIEW: ASA PAT syntax verification needed
access-list INSIDE_TO_OUTSIDE extended permit ip object-group OBJ_INTERNAL any
access-list OUTSIDE_TO_INSIDE extended deny ip any object-group OBJ_INTERNAL
access-list OUTSIDE_TO_INSIDE extended permit icmp any object-group OBJ_INTERNAL echo-reply
!
access-group INSIDE_TO_OUTSIDE in interface inside
access-group OUTSIDE_TO_INSIDE in interface outside
route outside 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254 1

detail.translated:
hostname FIREWALL_OBJ_POLICY
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 nameif inside
 security-level 100
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 nameif dmz
 security-level 50
 ip address 10.0.1.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/2
 nameif outside
 security-level 0
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
object-group network LAN_SERVERS
 network-object host 10.0.0.10
 network-object host 10.0.0.11
object-group network DMZ_SERVERS
 network-object host 10.0.1.10
 network-object host 10.0.1.11
object-group service WEB_SERVICES_TCP
 service-object tcp destination eq 80
 service-object tcp destination eq 443
!
! LAN_TO_DMZ policy - permit trust->dmz from LAN_SERVERS to DMZ_SERVERS
access-list inside_access_in extended permit tcp object LAN_SERVERS object DMZ_SERVERS eq 80
access-list inside_access_in extended permit tcp object LAN_SERVERS object DMZ_SERVERS eq 443
!
! DMZ_TO_WAN policy - permit dmz->untrust
access-list dmz_access_in extended permit ip any any
!
! WAN_TO_LAN_DENY policy - deny untrust->trust (implicit deny)
! ASA default denies traffic from lower to higher security-level
access-list outside_access_in extended deny ip any object-group LAN_SERVERS
!
access-group inside_access_in interface inside direction in
access-group dmz_access_in interface dmz direction in
access-group outside_access_in interface outside direction in
